contentTypeHeader;\n    body = request.body;\n  }\n  const response = await httpFetch(target, {\n    method: request.method,\n    headers,\n    body\n  });\n  const contentType = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    binarySize = buffer.byteLength;\n  } else {\n    raw = await response.text();\n    json = parseMaybeJson(raw, contentType);\n  }\n  const meta = async function requestTouchAdmPhr(request) {\n  const beforeMeta = ensureObservabilityMeta();\n  const target = buildTouchAdmPhrUrl(request.path, request.query);\n  const headers = {\n    Accept: request.accept ?? \"application/json, text/plain, */*\"\n  };\n  if (!headers[\"X-Access-Reason\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Access-Reason\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_ACCESS_REASON;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_CONSENT_TOKEN;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Device-Id\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Device-Id\"] = resolveTouchDeviceId();\n contentTypeHeader;\n    body = request.body;\n  }\n  const response = await httpFetch(target, {\n    method: request.method,\n    headers,\n    body\n  });\n  const contentType = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    binarySize = buffer.byteLength;\n  } else {\n    raw = await response.text();\n    json = parseMaybeJson(raw, contentType);\n  }\n  const meta = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    binarySize = buffer.byteLength;\n  } else {\n    raw = await response.text();\n    json = parseMaybeJson(raw, contentType);\n  }\n  const meta = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    binarySize = buffer.byteLength;\n  } else {\n    raw = await response.text();\n    json = parseMaybeJson(raw, contentType);\n  }\n  const meta = (path.startsWith(\"/\")) return `${API_BASE_URL}${path}`;\n    return `${API_BASE_URL}/${path}`;\n  })();\n  if (!query) return normalizedPath;\n  const trimmed = query.trim();\n  if (!trimmed) return normalizedPath;\n  if (normalizedPath.includes(\"?\")) {\n    return `${normalizedPath}&${trimmed}`;\n  }\n  return `${normalizedPath}?${trimmed}`;\n};\nconst resolveContentTypeHeader = (contentType) \"xml\":\n      return \"application/xml; charset=UTF-8\";\n    case \"json\":\n    default:\n      return \"application/json; charset=UTF-8\";\n  }\n};\nconst normalizeHeaders = (headers) => {\n contentType) => {\n  if (!raw) return void 0;\n  if (!shouldParseJson(raw, contentType)) return void 0;\n  try {\n    return JSON.parse(raw);\n  } catch {\n    return void 0;\n  }\n};\nconst (normalized.startsWith(\"text/\")) return \"text\";\n  if (normalized.includes(\"xml\")) return \"text\";\n  if (normalized.includes(\"javascript\")) return \"text\";\n  return \"binary\";\n};\nexport async function requestTouchAdmPhr(request) {\n  const beforeMeta = ensureObservabilityMeta();\n  const target = buildTouchAdmPhrUrl(request.path, request.query);\n  const headers = {\n    Accept: request.accept ?? \"application/json, text/plain, */*\"\n  };\n  if (!headers[\"X-Access-Reason\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Access-Reason\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_ACCESS_REASON;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_CONSENT_TOKEN;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Device-Id\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Device-Id\"] = resolveTouchDeviceId();\n  }\n  let body;\n  if (request.method !== \"GET\" && request.method !== \"HEAD\") {\n    const contentTypeHeader = resolveContentTypeHeader(request.contentType);\n    headers[\"Content-Type\"] = contentTypeHeader;\n    body = request.body;\n  }\n  const response = await httpFetch(target, {\n    method: request.method,\n    headers,\n    body\n  });\n  const contentType = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    binarySize = buffer.byteLength;\n  } else {\n    raw = await response.text();\n    json = parseMaybeJson(raw, contentType);\n  }\n  const meta = getObservabilityMeta();\n  return {\n    ok: response.ok,\n    status: response.status,\n    statusText: response.statusText,\n    raw,\n    json,\n    mode,\n    binarySize,\n    contentType,\n (path.startsWith(\"/\")) return `${API_BASE_URL}${path}`;\n    return `${API_BASE_URL}/${path}`;\n  })();\n  if (!query) return normalizedPath;\n  const trimmed = query.trim();\n  if (!trimmed) return \"xml\":\n      return \"application/xml; charset=UTF-8\";\n    case \"json\":\n    default:\n      return \"application/json; charset=UTF-8\";\n  }\n};\nconst normalizeHeaders = (headers) => {\n contentType) => {\n  if (!raw) return void 0;\n  if (!shouldParseJson(raw, contentType)) return void 0;\n  try {\n    return JSON.parse(raw);\n  } catch {\n    return void 0;\n  }\n};\nconst async function requestTouchAdmPhr(request) {\n  const beforeMeta = ensureObservabilityMeta();\n  const target = buildTouchAdmPhrUrl(request.path, request.query);\n  const headers = {\n    Accept: request.accept ?? \"application/json, text/plain, */*\"\n  };\n  if (!headers[\"X-Access-Reason\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Access-Reason\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_ACCESS_REASON;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_CONSENT_TOKEN;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Device-Id\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Device-Id\"] = resolveTouchDeviceId();\n  }\n  let body;\n  if (request.method !== \"GET\" && request.method !== \"HEAD\") {\n    const contentTypeHeader = resolveContentTypeHeader(request.contentType);\n    headers[\"Content-Type\"] = contentTypeHeader;\n    body = request.body;\n  }\n  const response = await httpFetch(target, {\n    method: request.method,\n    headers,\n    body\n  });\n  const contentType = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    binarySize = buffer.byteLength;\n  } else {\n    raw = await response.text();\n    json = parseMaybeJson(raw, contentType);\n  }\n  const meta = (path.startsWith(\"/\")) return `${API_BASE_URL}${path}`;\n    return `${API_BASE_URL}/${path}`;\n  })();\n  if (!query) return normalizedPath;\n  const trimmed = query.trim();\n  if (!trimmed) return \"xml\":\n      return \"application/xml; charset=UTF-8\";\n    case \"json\":\n    default:\n      return \"application/json; charset=UTF-8\";\n  }\n};\nconst normalizeHeaders = (headers) => {\n contentType) => {\n  if (!raw) return void 0;\n  if (!shouldParseJson(raw, contentType)) return void 0;\n  try {\n    return JSON.parse(raw);\n  } catch {\n    return void 0;\n  }\n};\nconst async function requestTouchAdmPhr(request) {\n  const beforeMeta = ensureObservabilityMeta();\n  const target = buildTouchAdmPhrUrl(request.path, request.query);\n  const headers = {\n    Accept: request.accept ?? \"application/json, text/plain, */*\"\n  };\n  if (!headers[\"X-Access-Reason\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Access-Reason\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_ACCESS_REASON;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_CONSENT_TOKEN;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Device-Id\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Device-Id\"] = resolveTouchDeviceId();\n  }\n  let body;\n  if (request.method !== \"GET\" && request.method !== \"HEAD\") {\n    const contentTypeHeader = resolveContentTypeHeader(request.contentType);\n    headers[\"Content-Type\"] = contentTypeHeader;\n    body = request.body;\n  }\n  const response = await httpFetch(target, {\n    method: request.method,\n    headers,\n    body\n  });\n  const contentType = response.headers.get(\"content-type\") ?? void 0;\n  const mode = resolveResponseMode(contentType);\n  let raw = \"\";\n  let json;\n  let binarySize;\n  if (mode === \"binary\") {\n    const buffer = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    binarySize = buffer.byteLength;\n  } else {\n    raw = await response.text();\n    json = parseMaybeJson(raw, contentType);\n  }\n  const meta = getObservabilityMeta();\n  return {\n    ok: response.ok,\n    status: response.status,\n    statusText: response.statusText,\n    raw,\n    json,\n    mode,\n    binarySize,\n    contentType,\n    headers: normalizeHeaders(response.headers),\n    runId: meta.runId ?? beforeMeta.runId,\n    traceId: meta.traceId ?? beforeMeta.traceId\n  };\n}\n\n//# (path.startsWith(\"/\")) return `${API_BASE_URL}${path}`;\n    return `${API_BASE_URL}/${path}`;\n  })();\n  if (!query) return normalizedPath;\n  const trimmed = query.trim();\n  if (!trimmed) return \"xml\":\n      return \"application/xml; charset=UTF-8\";\n    case \"json\":\n    default:\n      return \"application/json; charset=UTF-8\";\n  }\n};\nconst normalizeHeaders = (headers) => {\n contentType) => {\n  if (!raw) return void 0;\n  if (!shouldParseJson(raw, contentType)) return void 0;\n  try {\n    return JSON.parse(raw);\n  } catch {\n    return void 0;\n  }\n};\nconst async function requestTouchAdmPhr(request) {\n  const beforeMeta = ensureObservabilityMeta();\n  const target = buildTouchAdmPhrUrl(request.path, request.query);\n  const headers = {\n    Accept: request.accept ?? \"application/json, text/plain, */*\"\n  };\n  if (!headers[\"X-Access-Reason\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Access-Reason\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_ACCESS_REASON;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_CONSENT_TOKEN;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Device-Id\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Device-Id\"] = resolveTouchDeviceId();\n  }\n  let body;\n  if (request.method !== \"GET\" && request.method !== \"HEAD\") {\n    const contentTypeHeader = resolveContentTypeHeader(request.contentType);\n    headers[\"Content-Type\"] = contentTypeHeader;\n    body = request.body;\n  }\n  const response = await httpFetch(target, {\n    method: request.method,\n    headers,\n    body\n  });\n  const contentType = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    binarySize = buffer.byteLength;\n  } else {\n    raw = await response.text();\n    json = parseMaybeJson(raw, contentType);\n  }\n  const meta = getObservabilityMeta();\n  return {\n    ok: response.ok,\n    status: response.status,\n    statusText: response.statusText,\n    raw,\n    json,\n    mode,\n    binarySize,\n    contentType,\n    headers: normalizeHeaders(response.headers),\n    runId: meta.runId ?? beforeMeta.runId,\n    traceId: meta.traceId ?? beforeMeta.traceId\n  };\n}\n\n//# (path.startsWith(\"/\")) return `${API_BASE_URL}${path}`;\n    return `${API_BASE_URL}/${path}`;\n  })();\n  if (!query) return normalizedPath;\n  const trimmed = query.trim();\n  if (!trimmed) return \"xml\":\n      return \"application/xml; charset=UTF-8\";\n    case \"json\":\n    default:\n      return \"application/json; charset=UTF-8\";\n  }\n};\nconst normalizeHeaders = (headers) => {\n contentType) => {\n  if (!raw) return void 0;\n  if (!shouldParseJson(raw, contentType)) return void 0;\n  try {\n    return JSON.parse(raw);\n  } catch {\n    return void 0;\n  }\n};\nconst async function requestTouchAdmPhr(request) {\n  const beforeMeta = ensureObservabilityMeta();\n  const target = buildTouchAdmPhrUrl(request.path, request.query);\n  const headers = {\n    Accept: request.accept ?? \"application/json, text/plain, */*\"\n  };\n  if (!headers[\"X-Access-Reason\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Access-Reason\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_ACCESS_REASON;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_CONSENT_TOKEN;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Device-Id\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Device-Id\"] = resolveTouchDeviceId();\n  }\n  let body;\n  if (request.method !== \"GET\" && request.method !== \"HEAD\") {\n    const contentTypeHeader = resolveContentTypeHeader(request.contentType);\n    headers[\"Content-Type\"] = contentTypeHeader;\n    body = request.body;\n  }\n  const response = await httpFetch(target, {\n    method: request.method,\n    headers,\n    body\n  });\n  const contentType = response.headers.get(\"content-type\") ?? void 0;\n  const mode = resolveResponseMode(contentType);\n  let raw = \"\";\n  let json;\n  let binarySize;\n  if (mode === \"binary\") {\n    const buffer = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    binarySize = buffer.byteLength;\n  } else {\n    raw = await response.text();\n    json = parseMaybeJson(raw, contentType);\n  }\n  const meta = getObservabilityMeta();\n  return {\n    ok: response.ok,\n    status: response.status,\n    statusText: response.statusText,\n    raw,\n    json,\n    mode,\n    binarySize,\n    contentType,\n    headers: normalizeHeaders(response.headers),\n    runId: meta.runId ?? beforeMeta.runId,\n    traceId: meta.traceId ?? beforeMeta.traceId\n  };\n}\n\n//# (path.startsWith(\"/\")) return `${API_BASE_URL}${path}`;\n    return `${API_BASE_URL}/${path}`;\n  })();\n  if (!query) return normalizedPath;\n  const trimmed = query.trim();\n  if (!trimmed) return \"xml\":\n      return \"application/xml; charset=UTF-8\";\n    case \"json\":\n    default:\n      return \"application/json; charset=UTF-8\";\n  }\n};\nconst normalizeHeaders = (headers) => {\n contentType) => {\n  if (!raw) return void 0;\n  if (!shouldParseJson(raw, contentType)) return void 0;\n  try {\n    return JSON.parse(raw);\n  } catch {\n    return void 0;\n  }\n};\nconst async function requestTouchAdmPhr(request) {\n  const beforeMeta = ensureObservabilityMeta();\n  const target = buildTouchAdmPhrUrl(request.path, request.query);\n  const headers = {\n    Accept: request.accept ?? \"application/json, text/plain, */*\"\n  };\n  if (!headers[\"X-Access-Reason\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Access-Reason\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_ACCESS_REASON;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_CONSENT_TOKEN;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Device-Id\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Device-Id\"] = resolveTouchDeviceId();\n  }\n  let body;\n  if (request.method !== \"GET\" && request.method !== \"HEAD\") {\n    const contentTypeHeader = resolveContentTypeHeader(request.contentType);\n    headers[\"Content-Type\"] = contentTypeHeader;\n    body = request.body;\n  }\n  const response = await httpFetch(target, {\n    method: request.method,\n    headers,\n    body\n  });\n  const contentType = response.headers.get(\"content-type\") ?? void 0;\n  const mode = resolveResponseMode(contentType);\n  let raw = \"\";\n  let json;\n  let binarySize;\n  if (mode === \"binary\") {\n    const buffer = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    binarySize = buffer.byteLength;\n  } else {\n    raw = await response.text();\n    json = parseMaybeJson(raw, contentType);\n  }\n  const meta = getObservabilityMeta();\n  return {\n    ok: response.ok,\n    status: response.status,\n    statusText: response.statusText,\n    raw,\n    json,\n    mode,\n    binarySize,\n    contentType,\n    headers: normalizeHeaders(response.headers),\n    runId: meta.runId ?? beforeMeta.runId,\n    traceId: meta.traceId ?? beforeMeta.traceId\n  };\n}\n\n//# (!headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_CONSENT_TOKEN;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Device-Id\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Device-Id\"] = resolveTouchDeviceId();\n contentTypeHeader;\n    body = request.body;\n  }\n  const response = await httpFetch(target, {\n    method: request.method,\n    headers,\n    body\n  });\n  const contentType = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    binarySize = buffer.byteLength;\n  } else {\n    raw = await response.text();\n    json = parseMaybeJson(raw, contentType);\n  }\n  const meta = (path.startsWith(\"/\")) return `${API_BASE_URL}${path}`;\n    return `${API_BASE_URL}/${path}`;\n  })();\n  if (!query) return normalizedPath;\n  const trimmed = query.trim();\n  if (!trimmed) return \"xml\":\n      return \"application/xml; charset=UTF-8\";\n    case \"json\":\n    default:\n      return \"application/json; charset=UTF-8\";\n  }\n};\nconst normalizeHeaders = (headers) => {\n contentType) => {\n  if (!raw) return void 0;\n  if (!shouldParseJson(raw, contentType)) return void 0;\n  try {\n    return JSON.parse(raw);\n  } catch {\n    return void 0;\n  }\n};\nconst resolveResponseMode = (contentType) => {\n  if (!contentType) return \"text\";\n  const normalized = contentType.toLowerCase();\n  if (normalized.includes(\"json\")) return \"json\";\n  if (normalized.startsWith(\"text/\")) return \"text\";\n  if (normalized.includes(\"xml\")) return \"text\";\n  if (normalized.includes(\"javascript\")) return \"text\";\n  return \"binary\";\n};\nexport async function requestTouchAdmPhr(request) {\n  const beforeMeta = ensureObservabilityMeta();\n  const target = buildTouchAdmPhrUrl(request.path, request.query);\n  const headers = {\n    Accept: request.accept ?? \"application/json, text/plain, */*\"\n  };\n  if (!headers[\"X-Access-Reason\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Access-Reason\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_ACCESS_REASON;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_CONSENT_TOKEN;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Device-Id\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Device-Id\"] = resolveTouchDeviceId();\n  }\n  let body;\n  if (request.method !== \"GET\" && request.method !== \"HEAD\") {\n    const contentTypeHeader = resolveContentTypeHeader(request.contentType);\n    headers[\"Content-Type\"] = contentTypeHeader;\n    body = request.body;\n  }\n  const response = await httpFetch(target, {\n    method: request.method,\n    headers,\n    body\n  });\n  const contentType = response.headers.get(\"content-type\") ?? void 0;\n  const mode = resolveResponseMode(contentType);\n  let raw = \"\";\n  let json;\n  let binarySize;\n  if (mode === \"binary\") {\n    const buffer = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    binarySize = buffer.byteLength;\n  } else {\n    raw = await response.text();\n    json = parseMaybeJson(raw, contentType);\n  }\n  const meta = getObservabilityMeta();\n  return {\n    ok: response.ok,\n    status: response.status,\n    statusText: response.statusText,\n    raw,\n    json,\n    mode,\n    binarySize,\n    contentType,\n    headers: normalizeHeaders(response.headers),\n    runId: meta.runId ?? beforeMeta.runId,\n    traceId: meta.traceId ?? beforeMeta.traceId\n  };\n}\n\n//# contentType) => {\n  if (!raw) return void 0;\n  if (!shouldParseJson(raw, contentType)) return void 0;\n  try {\n    return JSON.parse(raw);\n  } catch {\n    return void 0;\n  }\n};\nconst async function requestTouchAdmPhr(request) {\n  const beforeMeta = ensureObservabilityMeta();\n  const target = buildTouchAdmPhrUrl(request.path, request.query);\n  const headers = {\n    Accept: request.accept ?? \"application/json, text/plain, */*\"\n  };\n  if (!headers[\"X-Access-Reason\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Access-Reason\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_ACCESS_REASON;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Consent-Token\"] = DEFAULT_TOUCH_CONSENT_TOKEN;\n  }\n  if (!headers[\"X-Device-Id\"]) {\n    headers[\"X-Device-Id\"] = resolveTouchDeviceId();\n  }\n  let body;\n  if (request.method !== \"GET\" && request.method !== \"HEAD\") {\n    const contentTypeHeader = resolveContentTypeHeader(request.contentType);\n    headers[\"Content-Type\"] = contentTypeHeader;\n    body = request.body;\n  }\n  const response = await httpFetch(target, {\n    method: request.method,\n    headers,\n    body\n  });\n  const contentType = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    binarySize = buffer.byteLength;\n  } else {\n    raw = await response.text();\n    json = parseMaybeJson(raw, contentType);\n  }\n  const meta = contentTypeHeader;\n    body = request.body;\n  }\n  const response = await httpFetch(target, {\n    method: request.method,\n    headers,\n    body\n  });\n  const contentType = await response.arrayBuffer();\n    binarySize = buffer.byteLength;\n  } else {\n    raw = await response.text();\n    json = parseMaybeJson(raw, contentType);\n  }\n  const meta =
